artifact_scope: source-model inventory of required transform-execution runtime evidence for data-shape honesty
skip_reason: No qemu-guest or mounted runtime transform execution was produced in this source-model slice.

required_runtime_rows.required_observation: write source bytes, transform through compiled policy, read/decode, and verify source and transformed digests under the same evidence cut
required_runtime_rows.missing_evidence: no runtime command, guest log, decoded bytes, or receipt record

required_runtime_rows.required_observation: verify source/transformed digest binding and mismatch refusal
required_runtime_rows.missing_evidence: no runtime mismatch or checksum refusal row

required_runtime_rows.required_observation: prove dedupe within a legal domain and refuse illegal or unknown domains
required_runtime_rows.missing_evidence: no mounted or qemu dedupe-domain execution row

required_runtime_rows.required_observation: bind ciphertext authentication to key epoch and refuse stale or wrong epochs
required_runtime_rows.missing_evidence: no runtime key-epoch or authenticated-decode row

required_runtime_rows.required_observation: encode/decode or recall through declared width and refuse under-width shapes
required_runtime_rows.missing_evidence: no runtime EC/archive encode, decode, recall, degraded, or under-width row

required_runtime_rows.required_observation: prove source mapping, split/replay, and refusal before source retirement
required_runtime_rows.missing_evidence: no runtime coalescing receipt or rollback row

required_runtime_rows.required_observation: prove old/new byte equivalence, cutover receipt, and source-retirement boundary
required_runtime_rows.missing_evidence: no runtime rebake execution, cutover, or retirement row

claim_effect: The transform-execution evidence class remains blocked; this artifact records the exact rows needed without widening product claims.
